“这里是强者的乐园，是弱者的坟墓。”
社畜苏槐一觉醒来，发现自己穿越到了弱肉强食，危机丛生的仙域。
跌跌撞撞历经七世惨死重开后，
没有受到系统青睐的他，终于凭借前几世经验一路兢兢业业忍气吞声苟到天下第六。
而后，在一个月黑风高的夜晚，喝高了的苏槐因为追逐一个刺客，无意间闯入了曾有过口舌之争的仙朝女帝闭关的竹林，并在误会中一把火点了人家的房子。
再而后，江湖上便流传起了仙朝女帝一刀一个老六的无敌传说……
酒醒时分，苏某人望着熟悉又陌生的苏家天花板，看着镜子里十七岁还是废材时期的自己，内心突然一阵阵地抽痛。

但是在番茄推荐好几次看到这本书 并且暂时有些书荒 抱着尝试的态度看了下去，确实给人一种不一样的感觉。快餐时代出现这种属实不易。希望这本书不会烂尾/太监吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681417211,"group_id":"7180206170336922664","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx85vv1drs3VivuNS/RRjMJpYiOOryeqFUCuI8LICVvw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/f7509836d40b4d0ca477acaf08619fca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795293&x-signature=9ki4Q%2B1y91YX0cbLoFmhjt5VZp4%3D","user_id":"2493304127108651","user_name":"北瑶光"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2493304127108651","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7180206170336922664","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生＋爽文+日常+腹黑+轻松＋反套路】

v-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779437556&x-signature=0ZYdtz0%2Fg76yq5rMnK8xMVKFTak%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2035895419536475","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.1526688e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323161236D529715553D76FBCD42C"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":31526,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":24726},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7198904031753028413","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的是，太好看了啊[捂脸]怎么说呢？刚开始看的时候觉得有些批low，伏笔全在后面，而且也不是慢热书，节奏明快，幽默风趣，同时，适度的小刀不会令人感到难受，带来一种这本书并不是纯粹的搞笑作品，而是一部有意义，有深度的文学美感。当然，最令我倾心的 是目前来讲，还没有真正意义上的无脑反派，门派之间的斗争，人心的复杂。敢用退婚流做开头的，往往难免落入俗套。但此书另辟蹊径，利用谨密的逻辑和严谨的人物形象，从小白文的范畴出中一跃而出。自我来番茄后，第一本能比肩顾长歌和长生的玄幻文。故而勉之。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1676125556,"group_id":"7180206170336922664","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"为世界上所有美好而战","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N53r64KRHJ3y2+Wg+fbHXkw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8881a15d25c04b948497e294577c5cca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794584&x-signature=fGfagaGKYi0popXBaYsksr8APTg%3D","user_id":"461415445717524","user_name":"风吹麦浪稻花儿香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"461415445717524","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7180206170336922664","book_info":{"abstract":"【重生＋爽文+日常+腹黑+轻松＋反套路】
